mission.title: Mission
mission.description: BufferLine builds measurement and governance infrastructure for human-AI judgment delegation. We develop the protocols, telemetry, and tools to make judgment shifts visible and governable.

stack.title: What we build
stack.jdvp: JDVP — Judgment Delegation Visibility Protocol. Measures where judgment moves during AI interaction.
stack.thinkprint: Thinkprint — Logic-mode playground engine. Externalizes thinking patterns into inspectable artifacts.
stack.metagovernance: Meta Governance — Systemic stabilization layer for judgment governance across organizations. (Future)

company.title: Company Information
company.name: BUFFERLINE LABS PTE. LTD.
company.type: Exempt Private Company Limited by Shares

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Sangwon (Sean) Seo
founder.bio: Blockchain engineer turned cognitive infrastructure builder. Previously Head of Blockchain at Helios and Head of Engineering at Lucidefi.
